notes: Minimal change: replaced `{activePerspective && selectedStep && <AnnotationPanel />}` pattern with ternary `{selectedStep && (activePerspective ? <AnnotationPanel /> : <empty-state div />)}` in both canvas views. The empty state div uses `border-t border-[var(--border-subtle)] px-4 py-3 text-sm text-white/55 text-center` matching the design system conventions. Same change applied for section/stage/touchpoint selection cases. When nothing is selected, panels still don't show at all — unchanged behavior.
